text:
Those are import from Python's standard library not from the subprocess32 compatibility library:

- https://docs.python.org/2/library/subprocess.html#subprocess.check_call
- https://docs.python.org/2/library/subprocess.html#subprocess.CalledProcessError
- https://docs.python.org/3/library/subprocess.html#subprocess.check_call
- https://docs.python.org/3/library/subprocess.html#subprocess.CalledProcessError
